phase_state_rows.state_reading: The theme first breaks into market attention and starts to detach from background noise.
The theme expands from core names into a broader cohort with catch-up and confirmation behavior.
The theme survives through role handoff rather than only first-leader continuation.
The theme loses breadth, handoff quality, or absorption and starts to become vulnerable to A-kill behavior.

stock_role_rows.role_reading: The name carrying height and direction-setting responsibility for the theme.
The stabilizing core or mid-cap confirmation name that helps the theme survive beyond a single spearhead.
The delayed beneficiary or lower-positioned name activated during diffusion or late expansion.
The weaker or indirect mapping name activated by narrative spillover rather than direct leadership.

strength_dimension_rows.reading: How long and how repeatedly the mainline can keep strengthening across days or weeks.
How far the theme has built vertical depth through leader height, mid-core follow-through, and laggard spread.
How well the theme absorbs supply during pullbacks or high-level consolidation instead of collapsing into A-kill.
How vulnerable the theme currently is to fast post-peak collapse or failed relay behavior.

driver_dimension_rows.reading: Whether the theme is backed by national strategy, industry encouragement, or only weak narrative support.
Whether the theme aligns with a real domestic industrial advantage or only a loose story shell.
Whether the broader tape, risk appetite, and index environment amplify the theme instead of fighting it.
Whether multiple policy, industry, overseas, or narrative events are resonating at the same time.

open_candidate_layer_rows.reading: Reserved for later discovery of more specific policy-strength proxies.
Reserved for later discovery of tape/regime variables such as trend persistence or broad risk-on context.
Reserved for later discovery of repeatable multi-event resonance patterns.
Reserved for later discovery of role-spread or catch-up intensity variables.

review_only_candidate_driver_rows.reading: National-strategy or regulator-level backing appears repeatedly in stronger mainlines.
Real domestic industrial advantage repeatedly appears in more durable theme diffusion lines.
Broad tape support and risk appetite act as recurring amplifiers rather than isolated noise.
Multiple overlapping events often separate large mainlines from one-shot theme spikes.
A theme usually needs visible leader height before it becomes a real mainline.
Stronger lines usually gain mid-core confirmation rather than staying single-core only.
Cross-day breadth expansion appears more meaningful than one-day broad spikes.
Strong lines repeatedly show better absorption and less A-kill vulnerability.
Fresh catalysts and repeated reinforcement often matter more than already-exhausted narratives.
Worth preserving in review, but still too noisy to freeze as a formal driver.

interpretation: V1.13A freezes a bounded grammar for theme-diffusion carry before any model or execution work begins.
The schema explicitly separates state, role, strength, and context-backed drivers instead of collapsing them into one bucket.
The open candidate layer records that more drivers may exist, but keeps them unfrozen until later review.
Cross-case driver candidates are preserved as review-only candidate drivers rather than formal schema law.
